# terrible_ovirt_ovirt_ovirt_affinity_group (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster` (String) Name of the cluster of the affinity group.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the affinity group to manage.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the affinity group.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `host_enforcing` (Boolean) If *yes* VM cannot start on host if it does not satisfy the `host_rule`. This parameter is support since oVirt/RHV 4.1 version.
- `host_rule` (String) If *positive* *all* VMs in this group should run on the this host. If *negative* *no* VMs in this group should run on the this host. If *disabled* this affinity group doesn't take effect. This parameter is support since oVirt/RHV 4.1 version.
- `hosts` (String) List of the hosts names, which should have assigned this affinity group. This parameter is support since oVirt/RHV 4.1 version.
- `hosts_labels` (String) List of the hosts lable names, which should have assigned this affinity group.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Should the affinity group be present or absent.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vm_enforcing` (Boolean) If *yes* VM cannot start if it does not satisfy the `vm_rule`.
- `vm_rule` (String) If *positive* *all* VMs in this group should run on the host defined by `host_rule`. If *negative* *no* VMs in this group should run on the host defined by `host_rule`. If *disabled* this affinity group doesn't take effect.
- `vms` (String) List of the VMs names, which should have assigned this affinity group.
- `vms_labels` (String) List of the hosts lable names, which should have assigned this affinity group.

### Read-Only

- `affinity_group` (String) Dictionary of all the affinity group attributes. Affinity group attributes can be found on your oVirt/RHV instance at following url: http://ovirt.github.io/ovirt-engine-api-model/master/#types/affinity_group.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
